0.a: It takes your idea, generates an outline, produces chapters, and converts your book into publishable output files.

1.q: Can I generate content in English?
1.a: Yes. The interface stays in Turkish, but book content can be produced in English or any other language you choose.

2.q: Can a first-time user understand this?
2.a: Yes. The main workflow consists of a 5-question wizard and 3 basic steps: idea, outline, publish.

3.q: Is the preview really free? Do I need card details?
3.a: Yes, completely free. You can complete the wizard, see your cover and chapter plan without registration or card details. The first 20% content preview is also included. Payment is only required when you want the full book and output files.

4.q: Is AI-generated content really usable quality?
4.a: The output is a structured outline — not like a professional editor, but a ready-to-edit skeleton instead of starting from a blank page. You can modify, regenerate, or replace any chapter with your own text. KDP-focused production workflow and our books are prepared with KDP-compliance focus.

5.q: Who is this product NOT suitable for?
5.a: It is not designed for novel or fiction writers, those seeking academic formatting (footnotes, bibliography), or technical documentation needs. It's the right tool for guides, expertise books, info products, or KDP non-fiction.

0.q: How do I create a book?
0.a: Enter brief information such as topic, target reader, tone, and language. The system builds an outline and chapter flow based on that.

1.q: Do I have to generate chapters before approving the outline?
1.a: No. It is recommended to decide on the outline first, then proceed to chapter generation.

2.q: Can I edit the book later?
2.a: Yes. Chapter contents and book metadata can be updated in the workspace.

3.q: Can I generate just a single piece like an introduction or summary?
3.a: The main workflow is focused on full book production. In advanced workflows, you can also work on specific chapters.

4.q: Can I write in Turkish and produce an English book?
4.a: Yes. You can fill out the wizard entirely in Turkish; the system produces content in your chosen language — including English. No translation tool needed.

5.q: How many chapters are generated? Can I control the length?
5.a: You approve the number of chapters and their titles during the outline stage; the system typically suggests a 7–12 chapter outline. You can add, remove, or reorder chapters.

AffiliatePage.heroDescription: Everyone who signs up for BookGenerator.net automatically receives an affiliate link. Share your link, earn a permanent 30% commission from every paying invitee.
AffiliatePage.howItWorksDescription: Sign up, share your link, earnings are calculated automatically. No extra tools or application required.
AffiliatePage.step1Desc: Sign up for BookGenerator.net. Your account automatically receives an affiliate link — no extra application required.
AffiliatePage.step2Desc: Copy your special link from your profile and share it on social media, blogs, email, or WhatsApp.
AffiliatePage.step3Desc: Earn a permanent 30% commission from everyone who signs up through your link and makes a payment. No limit.
AffiliatePage.commissionDescription: You earn commission every month as long as the person you invited continues their payment.
AffiliatePage.tableFootnote: Premium ($4 one-time) is outside commission scope. Approved after the 30-day refund period.
AffiliatePage.faq1A: No! Your affiliate link is automatically created as soon as you register. You can access it immediately from your profile settings or the /affiliate page.
AffiliatePage.faq2A: You earn a 30% commission from every active subscription payment. This repeats every month as long as the subscription is active.
AffiliatePage.faq3Q: Is the Premium plan ($4) included in commissions?
AffiliatePage.faq3A: No. Affiliate commissions only apply to monthly subscription plans (Starter, Creator, Pro).
AffiliatePage.faq4A: Payments are made via PayPal or bank transfer. Minimum payout threshold is $50. Payments are processed monthly.
AffiliatePage.faq5A: After the 30-day refund period expires, the commission is approved and added to your balance.
AffiliatePage.faq6Q: How many people can I invite?
AffiliatePage.faq6A: No limit. The more you share, the more you earn. Every paying member you invite brings a 30% commission.
AffiliatePage.faq7Q: Is it mandatory for my invitee to use my link?
AffiliatePage.faq7A: Yes. The affiliate system requires members to sign up through your special link. Your link carries the ?ref=YOURCODE parameter and is automatically recognized.
AffiliatePage.ctaDescLoggedIn: You can copy your link and track commissions from the detailed affiliate panel.
AffiliatePage.ctaDescGuest: Sign up, get your affiliate link, and start sharing. Earn a permanent 30% commission from every paying member.
